title: Gamer's Glee
description: Adds a handheld video game console to Minecraft!
body:
Gamer's Glee adds a handheld video game console known as the Gameblock, as well as several games to play with it! Tired of waiting for that super slow farm to do its work or playing on a sever and waiting for your friend to get to you? Play a short game to pass the time!

Make sure to join the [Discord server](https://discord.gg/RHpygkc9dG) if you want to ask questions, follow development, or just chat and make friends!

# **FEATURES**
-a handheld video game console known as the Gameblock

-4 fun games to play

-a simple and intuitive interface/operating system for the Gameblock

-custom music and sound effects for the Gameblock and its games

-visual effects to make each game look as smooth, polished, and professional as possible

-more to come!

# **WHERE DO I GET THE ITEMS?**
The Gameblock is crafted like so: ![Gameblock Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f2ba1e8141baddfca5e7a927c50c8388ee6043c.png)

The cartridge for Block Break has a 20% chance of spawning in dungeon chests.

The cartridge for Serpent has a 40% chance of spawning in Jungle Temple chests.

The cartridge for Defusal has a 16% chance of spawning in Desert Temple chests.

The cartridge for Flying Chicken has a 50% chance of spawning in Pillager Outpost chests.

# **SHOWCASE**
Check out this fun mod showcase made by the youtuber Drapie! 

<u>(note: the BlockStop store in this video is not a feature of Gamer's Glee)</u>

# **CREDITS**
DiamondWalker - mod creator & owner, coder, sprites, sound effects & music

TribalStone - various music tracks and sound effects

Somni - allowing me to use his original piece "god frequency" as the Gameblock OS menu theme (https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=uT2vwJu2tuM)

Flash_Shumway from freesound.org - the piep sound used for the Defusal timer (https://freesound.org/people/Flash_Shumway/sounds/114497/)

steveygos93 from freesound.org - the beeps3 sound, part of which was used for the Defusal selection sound (https://freesound.org/people/steveygos93/sounds/103588/)

qubodup from freesound.org - the Crunch sound used for the fruit eating in the Serpent game (https://freesound.org/people/qubodup/sounds/816237/)

Uzbazur from freesound.org - the Beating Wings Dry Sound used for the wing flaps in Flying Chicken (https://freesound.org/people/Uzbazur/sounds/330585/)
